description: Fidelización: NPS, churn prevention, referral loops, lifetime value optimization

items.name: NPS Optimization (Score > 50 = promoters)
items.framework: Ask: How likely 0-10? Promoters (9-10) → referral loop. Passives (7-8) → risk. Detractors (0-6) → churn risk.
items.action: Promoters: referral program ($50 per signup). Detractors: support call + concession.

items.name: Churn Prediction (prevent before happens)
items.signals: Usage decline >50%, no logins 14+ days, support tickets spiking, email opens drop
items.action: Automated: win-back email (special offer) → CS call → escalation

items.name: Referral Mechanics (viral loop, 2-3x growth)
items.structure: Refer → get $X discount. Referred friend gets $X discount. Both benefit.
items.growth: If 20% customers refer, +20% MRR. Repeat → compound growth.
